titleStmt.title: SII 39.21: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 21. (A.R. No. 21 of 1916.) SAṈṈAVAṈAM, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SĀLYAVANĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE SAME SHRINE. JAṬĀVARMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN VĪRAPĀṆḌYA -10TH YEAR.

summary.p: This inscriptions records the gift of money and land after deducting the taxes like Pañjupili Poṉvari, Paṟamai etc by Tirukkāṉappēruḍaiyāṉ Śivaṉindakālaṉ alias Māḷavachakravartiṉ, for the maintenance of Brāhmanas of Sāttamaṅgalam in Tiruttiyūrmuṭṭam and also to conduct special worship in the same temple every year on his birthday. It also mentions the signatories such as Māḷavachakravarti, Gurukulataraiyaṉ and Uttamapāṇḍyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ svastiśrī koṟcaṭaiya poṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī vīrapāṇṭiya devaṟku yāṇṭu 10Āvatu tirukkaṉapperuṭaiyāṉ civaṉinta kālaṉāṉa māla
vaccakravattiyeṉ tiruttiyūr muṭṭattu cāttamaṅkalattup paṟṟil ya pirāmaṇar pakkal vilai koṇṭu Uṭaiya viṉāraṇamaṅkalattu Ellaiyāva
tu kipāṟkellai viśvapaṟṟi Ellaikkum cūḷaciyāṉ piṟupaṟṟa Ellaikkum viyātaraiya ppaḷ caṇ[ ṭeśvara] paḷḷattu puṉceykku meṟkum teṉpāṟkkellai cā
tta maṅkalattup puṉcey Ellaikku vaṭakku melpāṟk kellai cāt vaṭakku nokkiyapoṉa peruvaḻikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ kellai
kuṉrattūṟṟu Ellaiyāṉa puṉceykku teṟkumāka yicainta perunaān kellai ṭacce
pāḷ pañcupili cantiṟavikkirakap peṟu poṉvari paṟamai maṟṟum ṉ tavintu ṭaiyā neṟṟi viḷai
puḷḷipukka nilattu cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ kolāl Oru mācce nel mum putukkācu muppatu kuṟuvai viḷaiñ
cu puḷḷipukka nilattukku Ivvaricaiyil Oṉṟu pātiyum tiṇai viḷaiñca nilattukku Ivvaricaiyil Oṉṟu kālumāka Ippaṭiyāl vanta nellu
muṭaiyār tiruccaṉṉavaṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku nām piṟantanāḷukku viśeṣa pujaikku veṇṭuvaṉa viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Ippaṭi
yāl vaṉta nellum kācum Ivarṟku cantirātittavar celvatāka nāṉkellaiyilun tiruccūla kallu nāṭṭi kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭik koṇṭu Aṉupavikkum paṭik
ku Ivai māḷavacakravatti Eḻuttu Ivai kurukulattaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Uttamapāṇṭiya viḻu Eḻuttu Itu paṉmāheśvarar rakṣai ya
Digital edition of SII 39.21 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
